items.claim: Nikita Krylov has 29 finishes in 31 career wins.
items.quote: He so he has 31 wins. 29 of those are finishes.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will not look small at light heavyweight because he was a massive welterweight and a large middleweight.
items.quote: He was always a massive 170 and then still pretty big 185.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney has a streak of seven consecutive fights that lasted two and a half minutes or less.
items.quote: He has one, two, three, four, five, six. Seven straight fights that were two and a half minutes or under.
